content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
CAUTION: Low volatility (20-day XU100 vol 25.0%) but extremely narrow participation (breadth 1/8 sectors positive), signalling a fragile rally.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Construction & REIT is the lone leader: TKFEN (1W: +8.70% | 1M: +43.19%) ABOVE TREND, ALARK (1W: +1.80% | 1M: +10.52%) ABOVE TREND and ENKAI (quant/top pick) contributing.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking, Technology & Telecom and Transportation are the weakest; AKBNK (1W: -7.21% | 1M: +13.53%) CORRECTION, KONTR (1W: -28.62% | 1M: +19.21%) CORRECTION and PGSUS (1W: -6.72% | 1M: +1.98%) CORRECTION lead the downside.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TKFEN (1W: +8.70% | 1M: +43.19%) ABOVE TREND, DOHOL (1W: +8.57% | 1M: +7.65%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +7.83% | 1M: +26.25%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +5.69% | 1M: +12.06%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +2.60% | 1M: +35.62%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -28.62% | 1M: +19.21%) CORRECTION, TRALT (1W: -10.33% | 1M: +6.42%) CORRECTION, TAVHL (1W: -8.73% | 1M: -2.73%) BELOW TREND, TRMET (1W: -8.50% | 1M: +5.65%) CORRECTION, FROTO (1W: -7.77% | 1M: -4.48%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Biggest moves: KONTR (1W: -28.62% | 1M: +19.21%) CORRECTION, TKFEN (1W: +8.70% | 1M: +43.19%) ABOVE TREND, DOHOL (1W: +8.57% | 1M: +7.65%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +7.83% | 1M: +26.25%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: -10.33% | 1M: +6.42%) CORRECTION.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks are under pressure and in CORRECTION after a selloff; AKBNK (1W: -7.21% | 1M: +13.53%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -6.53% | 1M: +10.70%) CORRECTION, ISCTR (1W: -6.68% | 1M: +10.60%) CORRECTION — trim cyclical exposure.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed: KRDMD (1W: +0.38% | 1M: +25.31%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +1.59% | 1M: +25.32%) ABOVE TREND and TOASO (1W: +0.86% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND outperform while FROTO (1W: -7.77% | 1M: -4.48%) BELOW TREND signals idiosyncratic weakness.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Selective strength: PETKM (1W: +7.83% | 1M: +26.25%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +5.69% | 1M: +12.06%) ABOVE TREND and SASA (1W: +2.60% | 1M: +35.62%) ABOVE TREND lead; watch TRALT (1W: -10.33% | 1M: +6.42%) CORRECTION and TRMET (1W: -8.50% | 1M: +5.65%) CORRECTION for mean reversion risk.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Adopt a defensive tilt: reduce beta and take profits on stretched winners; favor high-quality names in Construction & REIT and selective Energy/Heavy Industry longs (PETKM, TUPRS, TKFEN) while using hedges for tech/transport exposure.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TKFEN (1W: +8.70% | 1M: +43.19%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +7.83% | 1M: +26.25%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +5.69% | 1M: +12.06%) ABOVE TREND, KONTR (1W: -28.62% | 1M: +19.21%) CORRECTION, ASELS (1W: +1.59% | 1M: +25.32%) ABOVE TREND.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Construction & REIT for leadership confirmation, Energy & Chemicals for commodity-driven continuation, and Technology & Telecom for volatility and potential washouts.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to failure of the 1W low (immediate support) and reclaim of the 1M high (key resistance); monitor USD/TRY moves, CBRT communications, Q1 earnings releases and oil/commodity price swings as primary catalysts.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low volatility masks a fragile market: CAUTION regime with breadth at 1/8. Opportunity concentrated in Construction & REIT and select Energy names (PETKM, TUPRS, TKFEN) while banks, tech and transport face short-term corrections and require hedges.
